entries.description: Discover all available DataRobot resources — skills, MCP servers, and agents — by fetching the live DataRobot catalog directly.
representativeQueries: find DataRobot capabilities for my task
what DataRobot tools are available
discover DataRobot skills and MCP servers

entries.description: Set up DataRobot for local development, configure credentials, and install the Python SDK and CLI.
representativeQueries: set up DataRobot for local development
install the DataRobot Python SDK and CLI
configure DataRobot credentials and authentication

entries.description: Train models, manage projects, and run AutoML experiments on DataRobot.
representativeQueries: train a machine learning model on DataRobot
create a new DataRobot project and run AutoML
start model training on DataRobot

entries.description: Deploy models, manage deployments, and configure prediction environments on DataRobot.
representativeQueries: deploy a trained model to DataRobot
manage DataRobot model deployments
configure a prediction endpoint on DataRobot

entries.description: Make predictions, batch score, and generate prediction datasets on DataRobot.
representativeQueries: make predictions using a DataRobot deployment
batch score a dataset on DataRobot
generate a prediction template for DataRobot

entries.description: Engineer features, run feature discovery, and analyze feature importance on DataRobot.
representativeQueries: analyze feature importance on DataRobot
run feature discovery in DataRobot
engineer features for a DataRobot project

entries.description: Monitor model performance, track data drift, and manage model health on DataRobot.
representativeQueries: monitor a DataRobot model for data drift
check model health and performance on DataRobot
track accuracy degradation in DataRobot deployment

entries.description: Explain model predictions, compute SHAP values, and run model diagnostics on DataRobot.
representativeQueries: explain DataRobot model predictions with SHAP
compute feature impact for a DataRobot model
run model diagnostics on DataRobot

entries.description: Upload datasets, manage data assets, and validate data for DataRobot workflows.
representativeQueries: upload a dataset to DataRobot
validate data before training on DataRobot
manage datasets in DataRobot

entries.description: Set up CI/CD pipelines for DataRobot application templates with GitLab and GitHub Actions.
representativeQueries: set up CI/CD for a DataRobot app template
automate DataRobot deployment with GitHub Actions
configure GitLab pipeline for DataRobot

entries.description: Instrument external agents with OpenTelemetry for DataRobot observability. Supports LangGraph, CrewAI, LlamaIndex, PydanticAI, and others.
representativeQueries: instrument a LangGraph agent for DataRobot monitoring
send OpenTelemetry traces to DataRobot from CrewAI
monitor an external AI agent with DataRobot

entries.description: Build and deploy AI agents on DataRobot. Supports LangGraph, CrewAI, LlamaIndex, and base agents with MCP server and React frontend bundling.
representativeQueries: build and deploy an AI agent on DataRobot
create a LangGraph agent with DataRobot
deploy a CrewAI agent to DataRobot with MCP server

entries.description: Deploy, scale, debug, and operate container workloads on DataRobot's Workload API.
representativeQueries: deploy a container as a managed service on DataRobot
scale or debug a DataRobot workload
manage autoscaling and replicas for a DataRobot workload
